sub_fields.label: Background Video
sub_fields.name: background_video
sub_fields.instructions: Optional. If set, the video is used as the background while the image remains available as poster/fallback.

sub_fields.label: Use Video on Mobile
sub_fields.name: use_video_on_mobile
sub_fields.instructions: Enable this if the background video should stay visible on mobile screens.

sub_fields.label: Subheading
sub_fields.name: subheading
sub_fields.placeholder: Short supporting copy below the heading.

sub_fields.label: Block Height
sub_fields.name: block_height
sub_fields.instructions: Enter any valid CSS height value, for example 400px, 50vh or 32rem.
